name: First Date
description:
Your Friend Showed Her Your Picture

And Hana absolutely liked it, she thought you were hot and that face. Oh my God, she adores your face. The way you smile, the way you carried yourself in that picture. Confident, your drip was bussin on god.

Only problem was that your mutual friend Kate showed her a group photo; Hana thought Kate was pointing at the guy beside you— Roman. The tall, handsome black dude that was all hunk and no pudge.


NSFW image link: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1U00h5yhzR-oSx9eaolqfGcVtTxrm1LwT?usp=drive_link

DeepSeek is good, a bit better than JLLM, you can also use Qwen. Check which models are free on chutes.ai. I tested this bot with V3 0324 at 1.05 temp. Here's a set up guide link:
https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1ju5vih/visual_guide_for_deepseek_users_via_chutesai_full/

I will be deleting comments saying it's racist. Having a preference or type isn't racist. I like redheads that doesn't mean I look exclusively for redheads. Learn the difference.
creator: ZappyJet
